calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-21-2004 Off Calendar

Quiet Title
Off Calendar May-04-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Quiet Title to Real Property/Defalut Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
William K. Holsman, Esq. for Plaintiff Douglas J. McConnon and ALice McConnon.
Mr. Douglas McConnon is also present in court, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiffs Douglas J. McConnon aka Douglas McConnon, and Alice McConnon aka Alice M. Baus, were owners in fee simple of the real property (see datails in Judgment) and against the defendants: Carol M. McConnon, Carol M. McConnon as Administrator of the Estate of John S. McConnon, Lee Ann Gall aka Lee Ann McConnon, Dava Brinkerhoff aka Dana McConnon, and all persons unknown, claiming any legal or equitable interest in the property described in the complaint adverse to Plaintifs' title or any cloud on Plaintiffs' title thereto named as Does 1-50, own no right, title, interest, or lien, whatever, in the property.
Judgment signed in open court.

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Quiet Title hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Lee.
William Holsman, Esq. for Plaintiff Douglas J. McConnon aka Douglas McConnon, also present, was sworn & examined.
Not all Defendants defaulted, at counsel's request, this matter is continued to May 4, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
